warm_up:
Warm-up
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
5e/s WGS
5e/s Squat Knee Taps
10 Broad Jumps
1 Rounds (Barbell):
3 Muscle Snatch
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat

hypertrophy.reasoning: Snatch and OHS dominate shoulders, quads, and core; accessorize opposing movement patterns.
